plugins.name: ui-skills
plugins.description: Reverse-engineer any live website into production-ready React + Tailwind code. Reads actual computed CSS, DOM structure, JS interactions, and animations — not just a screenshot. Verifies output with 60 fps three-capture comparison (static, scroll, interaction). Includes a sub-skill for precise WAAPI/canvas/WebGL animation extraction with frame-by-frame scrubbing.
